name: Oath of Companionship
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦友</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とも</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>誓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い
desc: If you control no monsters that were Special Summoned from the Extra Deck: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; take control of it until the End Phase. You cannot Special Summon during the turn you activate this card.
eff: If you control no monsters that were Special Summoned from the Extra Deck: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; take control of it until the End Phase. You cannot Special Summon during the turn you activate this card.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
